meta.title: Tokamachi City Matsudai Family Ski Resort
meta.description: Steps from Matsudai Station—Japan's first surf-skate ramp and ¥1,000 night skiing at a local culture ski hill.

hero.title:
Matsudai Family
Ski Resort
hero.tagline: Surf-skate ramp and premium night skiing—Echigo's local culture hill.

night.label: Night ski
night.note: Groomed burn · only in Tokamachi city

transit.title:
Matsudai Station,
15 minutes on foot.
transit.lead: Hokuhoku Line Matsudai Station is a 15–20 minute walk—or 2–3 minutes by car. A station-close local hill tied to the Echigo-Tsumari art region. About 50 minutes from Rokka-machi IC via Route 253.
transit.imgAlt: Hokuhoku Line Matsudai Station—snow-country stop within walking distance of the hill

primary.title: Japan's first surf-skate ramp
primary.lead: A one-of-a-kind ramp inside the center-house garage—built with local carpenters and visited by pros. When snow is thin, it keeps youth on site for après sessions. A weapon no other hill has (LP concept).
primary.imgAlt: Indoor surf-skate ramp at the center house—snow meets street culture

secondary.title: ¥1,000 night skiing & groomed burn
secondary.lead: Tokamachi's only regular night operation—fresh grooming before lights-on delivers tight corduroy at an unbeatable ¥1,000. A local night scene for after-work riders.

pass.title:
Adult ¥2,500,
night ¥1,000.
pass.lead: A compact 5.8 ha municipal hill—adult day ticket ¥2,500, night ticket ¥1,000. 120 free parking spaces. Pricing that supports both local families and young park riders (LP concept).
pass.noticeBody: Base elevation 185 m means spring snow can vary—night grooming and park upkeep protect the experience. Ramp monetization and weekend food trucks aim to lift spend per visit (report proposal).
pass.imgAlt: Access from Matsudai Station—local Echigo Matsushiro hill

rental.title:
Rental, shop,
all in one lodge.
rental.lead: Restaurant, rental shop, and retail inside the ski center—walkable from Matsudai Station for a hands-free visit. After runs, head to the surf-skate ramp in the same building.
rental.whisper: Terrain park (kickers, rails, boxes) plus the ramp—positioned as a third place for board and skate culture (LP strategy).
rental.imgAlt: Center house—from rental counter to the skate ramp

yukinko.title:
Groomed burn,
night ¥1,000.
yukinko.lead: Groomers run before night skiing, so riders get tight corduroy at a bargain price—highly rated by local snowboarders. Tokamachi's only regular night operation.
yukinko.whisper: TEL 025-597-3330. Check the official site for the latest night schedule and Lift 2 operations.
yukinko.imgAlt: Floodlit night piste—evening runs on groomed snow

family.title:
50% beginner,
family and park.
family.lead: Course mix: 50% beginner, 30% intermediate, 20% advanced. Lift 1 splits to three runs; Lift 2 summit offers ungroomed powder (max 24°). Kickers, rails, and boxes in the terrain park.
family.noticeBody: Regulars and locals call it "our ski hill"—staff watch over kids warmly. A home hill welcoming both families and young park riders.
family.imgAlt: Family on gentle slopes—a compact beginner-friendly hill

workation.title:
Art × Snow × Skate,
one Matsudai day.
workation.lead: A loop tied to the Echigo-Tsumari Matsudai Field Museum—morning runs and park, lunch at Satoyama Shokudo, afternoon ramp session, evening night ski, then soak at Shibatoge Onsen Unkai (LP concept).

01.title: Morning first tracks
01.body: Summit powder via Lift 2 or a park session

02.title: Field Museum & lunch
02.body: Satoyama Shokudo lunch in an art space

03.title: Skate ramp
03.body: Après session on the indoor ramp

04.title: Night ski ¥1,000
04.body: Freshly groomed burn under the lights

05.title: Shibatoge Onsen Unkai
05.body: Open-air bath 7 minutes away by car

local.title: Surf-skate ramp deep dive
local.body: Japan's first uniquely shaped ramp—built by local tradespeople and carpenters. Pro snowboarders and skaters visit for the quality. The snow×street gap is Matsudai's core differentiator (report ch. 2).

schools.title: Night & skate combo pass (concept)
schools.body: Bundle night ticket, ramp access, and hot-spring entry—sold online for young riders with #OurMatsushiro social tags (report ch. 7, working title).

summer.title: Year-round action sports camp
summer.body: Green season: full indoor ramp operation—partner with Matsushiro Castle Ruins Park camping for day school, night camp revenue (report ch. 6).

access.note: 15 min walk from Hokuhoku Matsudai Stn · 120 free parking spaces
